content.full_text:
Memorandum

To: File No. M-83-021

Date: Feb. 2, 1983

From: FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION  
Barbara A. Milman

Subject: Telephone Advice to Wendy Julepp, Baldwin Park 1/27/83

A city council acting as the redevelopment agency is exempt from Section 84308. (Reg. 18438.1)

An individual councilman who is appointed to sanitation district board is not exempt in that capacity.

BAM:plh
